introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Bakersfield, The Azizi Firm is here to help. Bakersfield's position at the southern end of the Central Valley means heavy traffic from agriculture, oil industry workers, and interstate commerce creates serious accident risks. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Bakersfield car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions, T-bone accidents at major intersections like California Avenue and Stockdale Highway, head-on collisions on rural highways, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents involving oil field equipment and agricultural transport, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, and accidents on SR-58 and SR-99.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Bakersfield
sections.body: Bakersfield's economy centered on agriculture and oil production creates unique traffic patterns. Common causes include fatigued driving by shift workers, heavy truck traffic on SR-99 and SR-58, speeding on long straight rural roads, drunk driving, distracted driving, dense tule fog causing multi-vehicle pileups in winter, and oil field service vehicles on highways. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Bakersfield?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene including weather conditions (fog, dust, etc.), exchange information with other drivers, get witness contacts, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies. If an oil company vehicle is involved, corporate insurance policies may apply.

faq.question: How much is my Bakersfield car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages given local earning levels, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Cases involving commercial vehicles often have higher policy limits. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We understand the unique challenges of Kern County courts and know how to build strong cases for Central Valley accident victims.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Bakersfield, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
